name: Curried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the curry powder, cumin, salt, and pepper.
2. Add the minced garlic and tomato paste (if using) to the spice mixture.
3. Stir in the water until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture over chicken pieces or chunks.
5. Cover the chicken and let it marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to several hours.
6. When ready to cook, discard any remaining marinade and proceed with your preferred cooking method (e.g., roasting, grilling, or sautéing).
